name: Fiona (OGR Vector Geo Data I/O)

auth.notes: Local GDAL/OGR library; no auth for local files

performance.notes: GDAL/OGR backend; disk I/O bound for large files; streaming read supported

agent_readiness.notes: Python wrapper for OGR (part of GDAL) for vector geospatial data. import fiona. with fiona.open('roads.shp') as src: crs = src.crs; for feature in src: geom = feature['geometry']; props = feature['properties']. Write: fiona.open('out.geojson', 'w', driver='GeoJSON', crs=crs, schema=schema). Formats: Shapefile, GeoJSON, GeoPackage, KML, PostGIS, 80+ formats. CRS handling. Geometry as GeoJSON dict. Used internally by GeoPandas. pyogrio is a faster alternative (Arrow-backed). Fiona 2.0 drops GDAL <3.1.

gotchas: GDAL installation can be complex on non-Linux systems
Reading one feature at a time in loop is slow for large files
pyogrio is faster alternative for bulk reads (Arrow-backed)
Coordinate reference system (CRS) handling requires geospatial knowledge
best_when: When GeoPandas is too heavy (just need file I/O)
avoid_when: Teams without GDAL knowledge — GeoPandas provides better abstractions
summary: Fiona is a Python wrapper for OGR (GDAL) vector geospatial I/O. fiona.open('roads.shp') reads Shapefiles, GeoJSON, GeoPackage, KML, 80+ formats. for feature in src: iterates features as GeoJSON dicts. Write via fiona.open('out.geojson', 'w', driver='GeoJSON'). CRS access via src.crs. Used internally by GeoPandas. For bulk high-performance reads use pyogrio (Arrow-backed). For raster data use rasterio.
